dodo-payments.description: The Dodo Payments MCP Server integrates with agentic frameworks to provide a lightweight, serverless-compatible interface for AI-driven payment operations like billing, subscriptions, and customer management. It enables autonomous agents to securely act on behalf of users using the Dodo Payments API.
